Event Date: 16/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AM352
Breath of Noon Amulet

Once in a while, the unit increases the health, fortitude, physical and magic armor to self and the allied unit with the greatest physical armor by 55% for 4 sec. Every second for that duration, the ability's targets restore health equal to 75% of their physical armor. If the targets die within 4 sec. after the ability has triggered, they are resurrected with 20% health.

Requirements: 98-100
